name: Ashfall
label: Official ECHO Pack #1
description: A ruined-world sci-fi survival modpack built to showcase the ECHO module stack while preserving reusable standalone modules.
goals: Showcase the full ECHO module stack through Ashfall's first-play route
Provide a post-collapse survival campaign with clear Terminal, Index, Lens, HoloMap, and MissionCore guidance
Demonstrate optional module integrations without making Ashfall mandatory

launcherCard.title: Ashfall
launcherCard.subtitle: Official ECHO Pack #1 Showcase
launcherCard.description: Official ECHO Pack #1 showcases the ECHO stack through Ashfall-only first-play and first-month route guidance.

showcaseFlow: start at the armored drop pod
open Terminal and read the Ashfall field dashboard
read the Ashfall Showcase Flow Index entry
pin the first HoloMap field objective
accept the Ashfall Showcase Opening MissionCore mission
respond to the first WeatherCore toxic-front warning
recover a small RelicTech field note
defer Nexus, Orbital, Stationfall, and Blackbox hooks until the player is supplied

showcaseIntegrations.terminal: Field dashboard summarizes the current next step and links to Index, mission, and marker ids.
showcaseIntegrations.index: Showcase Flow, Profile Isolation, Relic Field Note, and Power Repair entries stay in the Ashfall namespace.
showcaseIntegrations.missioncore: Ashfall Showcase Opening chains the first ECHO systems without adding a new content wave.
showcaseIntegrations.holomap: Showcase Flow layer exposes opening route markers only for the Ashfall official profile.
showcaseIntegrations.lens: Opening scan rows unlock Index and MissionCore context for wreckage, relic, and power repair beats.
showcaseIntegrations.weathercore: Toxic Front warning teaches retreat and shelter without becoming a punishment spike.
showcaseIntegrations.soundcore: Subtle optional cue profile supports Terminal, Lens, relic, and repair feedback.
showcaseIntegrations.worldcore: Showcase Corridor groups the opening route as profile-scoped field intel.
showcaseIntegrations.relictech: First relic field note demonstrates discovery cross-links before Nexus escalation.
showcaseIntegrations.powergrid: Drop-pod grid repair uses the 1.0.0 tech wave as a small survival repair step.
showcaseIntegrations.armory: First Field Upgrade introduces gear readiness before faction pressure rises.
showcaseIntegrations.logisticsConvoy: Depot and convoy hooks remain optional later-route bridges.
showcaseIntegrations.stationNexusBlackbox: Story links are signposted as later hooks, not front-loaded requirements.
showcaseIntegrations.themeCore: Ashfall Cyberglass tokens use orange warning, cyan focus, and dark panel surfaces.
